risk_rationale: The regulatory guidance mandates tackling harmful online content, which aligns with existing proactive detection measures but may require enhancements in specific areas like chat and messaging services.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: CSAM detection using PhotoDNA + proprietary classifiers
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Mandates tackling harmful online content across various services, including chat and messaging
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline focuses on CSAM detection but may not fully cover the expanded scope of chat and messaging services as required by the new standards.

remediations.title: Enhance CSAM Detection for Chat and Messaging Services
remediations.description: Develop and integrate advanced detection algorithms specifically for chat and messaging services to comply with the new standards.
acceptance_criteria: Enhanced detection algorithms are deployed in chat and messaging services
Regular audits confirm compliance with new standards

business_impact: Potential increase in operational costs due to the need for enhanced detection capabilities, but aligns with global safety expectations, potentially improving brand reputation.
recommended_actions: Conduct a gap analysis of current detection capabilities in chat and messaging services
Develop a project plan for enhancing detection algorithms
Engage with regulatory bodies to ensure compliance alignment
